noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're driving and using DASH but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: Park farther, use DASH for last mile
default.body: Park in a less crowded area and take the free DASH shuttle to get closer to your destination.

steps.title: Park farther from destination
steps.description: Find parking away from the destination where spots are easier to find. Look for areas with less competition.

steps.title: Take the DASH shuttle
steps.description: Walk to the nearest DASH stop and board the free downtown shuttle. Ride it to get closer to your destination.

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're driving and taking transit but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: Park at Rapid stop, take transit
default.body: Park near a Rapid transit stop and take the bus to get closer to your destination.

steps.title: Park near a Rapid stop
steps.description: Find parking near a Rapid transit stop. This area will have more available parking.

steps.title: Board The Rapid
steps.description: Walk to the Rapid stop and board the bus. Ride to a stop that's within walking distance of your destination.
steps.linkText: View transit route on Google Maps

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're driving and using micromobility but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: Park farther, use Lime for last mile
default.body: Park in a less crowded area and use a Lime scooter or bike for the final stretch.

steps.title: Park farther from destination
steps.description: Find parking away from the destination where spots are easier to find. Look for areas with less competition.

steps.title: Find and ride a Lime scooter or bike
steps.description: Open the Lime app and locate the nearest available scooter or bike. Unlock it and ride directly to your destination.

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're driving but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

noCost.title: No options available
noCost.body: Parking meters are enforced Monday-Friday 8am-7pm. Since you're not willing to pay for parking, there are no options available during enforcement hours.

meteredParking.title: Park at metered street parking
meteredParking.body: Park at street meters near the amphitheater. Meters are enforced Monday-Friday 8am-7pm.

steps.title: Find metered parking
steps.description: Look for parking meters on streets near Acrisure Amphitheater (201 Market Ave SW): Market Avenue, Bridge Street, and surrounding downtown streets. Meters are typically available within 0.3 miles of the venue.

steps.title: Pay for parking
steps.description: Pay using the Motu (Mobile GR) app, or at the meter using cash, credit/debit card, or mobile payment. Rates are $1.25-$2.00 per half hour in prime areas ($2.50-$4.00 per hour). Maximum duration is typically 2-3 hours (varies by location).

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Walk from your parking spot to the amphitheater on the Grand River.

alternate.title: Find free street parking
alternate.body: Spend 20 minutes in traffic circling the area to find free unmetered street parking. Look for residential or less commercial areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination.

steps.title: Spend 20 minutes in traffic looking for free street parking
steps.description: Circle the blocks looking for free unmetered street parking spots in residential or less commercial areas. Look for areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination. Be aware of odd-even parking restrictions from November 1 to April 1. This may take 20+ minutes of driving in traffic.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Once you find a spot, park and walk.

affordableLot.title: Park at affordable lot near Bridge Street and walk
affordableLot.body: Park at a surface lot or nearby lot within {walkMiles} miles and walk the rest of the way. Lots near Bridge Street and Turner Avenue offer lower rates.

steps.title: Find affordable parking near the amphitheater
steps.description: Bridge Street and Turner Avenue have several lots: Red Lion Lot (412 Bridge St NW), Golden Saint Lot (525 Turner Ave NW, about $4), Bridge Street Parking Lot (433 Bridge St NW, about $5), and 528 Bridge St NW (about $8). All are within 0.1–0.2 miles of Acrisure Amphitheater.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Park your car and walk up to {walkMiles} miles to 201 Market Ave SW.

alternate.title: Find free street parking
alternate.body: Spend 20 minutes in traffic circling the area to find free unmetered street parking. Look for residential or less commercial areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination.

steps.title: Spend 20 minutes in traffic looking for free street parking
steps.description: Circle the blocks looking for free unmetered street parking spots in residential or less commercial areas. Look for areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination. Be aware of odd-even parking restrictions from November 1 to April 1. This may take 20+ minutes of driving in traffic.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Once you find a spot, park and walk up to {walkMiles} miles.

freeStreet.title: Find free street parking
freeStreet.body: Spend 20 minutes in traffic circling the area to find street parking. Meters are not enforced on the weekend.

steps.title: Spend 20 minutes in traffic looking for free street parking
steps.description: Circle the blocks looking for free unmetered street parking spots. Look for areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination. Be aware of odd-even parking restrictions from November 1 to April 1. This may take 20+ minutes of driving in traffic.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Once you find a spot, park and walk up to {walkMiles} miles.

cheaperGarage.title: Park at parking garage or on-site amphitheater lot
cheaperGarage.body: There are parking garages and the venue's 400-space lot near the amphitheater. Downtown ramps and the on-site lot fill quickly for concerts.

steps.title: Park at downtown garage or amphitheater lot
steps.description: Acrisure Amphitheater has a 400-space attached lot; availability is limited for big shows. City-owned ramps and lots downtown (e.g. Monroe Center Ramp, Ottawa-Fulton Ramp) are about 0.3–0.5 miles away and charge around $1.50/hour, max $12. Reserve in advance via ParkWhiz for the venue area if possible.

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Walk from the garage or lot to the amphitheater entrance at 201 Market Ave SW.

alternate.title: Park at Bridge Street or surface lot
alternate.body: Park at a surface lot near Bridge Street or Turner Avenue within {walkMiles} miles. These are often cheaper than ramps but fill up on event nights.

steps.title: Find surface lot near Bridge Street
steps.description: Lots at 528 Bridge St NW, 433 Bridge St NW, 412 Bridge St NW, or 525 Turner Ave NW offer $4–$8 parking within 0.1–0.2 miles of the amphitheater.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Park your car and walk up to {walkMiles} miles to the venue.

premiumRamp.title: Park at premium garage or reserved amphitheater parking
premiumRamp.body: Park at a premium ramp or reserve event parking close to the amphitheater for convenient access. The 400-space on-site lot is the closest option; reserve in advance for concerts.

steps.title: Reserve amphitheater or premium downtown parking
steps.description: Acrisure Amphitheater's attached lot (201 Market Ave SW) has about 400 spaces; event pricing often applies and advance reservation is recommended. Premium downtown ramps (e.g. Arena Place, Studio Park) are 0.3–0.5 miles away and typically $27–$30 for events. Use ParkWhiz or the venue site to book near the amphitheater.

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Walk from the lot to the amphitheater entrance along the Grand River.

alternate.title: Find free street parking
alternate.body: Spend 20 minutes in traffic circling the area to find free unmetered street parking. Look for residential or less commercial areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination.

steps.title: Spend 20 minutes in traffic looking for free street parking
steps.description: Circle the blocks looking for free unmetered street parking spots in residential or less commercial areas. Look for areas without parking meters, typically found farther from the destination. Be aware of odd-even parking restrictions from November 1 to April 1. This may take 20+ minutes of driving in traffic.

steps.title: Park and walk
steps.description: Once you find a spot, park and walk.

noCost.title: No options available
noCost.body: The Rapid fare is $1.75. Consider adjusting your budget to see recommendations.

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're taking The Rapid and using DASH but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: Take Rapid, then DASH
default.body: Ride The Rapid to downtown, then use the free DASH shuttle to get closer to your destination.

steps.title: Board The Rapid
steps.description: Go to your nearest Rapid stop and board the bus. Ride to a downtown stop that's near a DASH connection point.
steps.linkText: View transit route on Google Maps

steps.title: Transfer to DASH
steps.description: Get off The Rapid and walk to the nearest DASH stop. Board the free DASH shuttle and ride it closer to your destination.

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Get off the DASH shuttle and walk the remaining distance to your destination.

noCost.title: No options available
noCost.body: The Rapid fare is $1.75. Consider adjusting your budget to see recommendations.

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're taking The Rapid but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: The Rapid + short walk
default.body: Plan your route to a Rapid stop near your destination. Avoid transfers if possible. After getting off, walk the remaining distance.

steps.title: Take The Rapid
steps.description: Go to your nearest Rapid stop and board the bus. Ride to a stop near your destination. Avoid transfers if possible.
steps.linkText: View transit route on Google Maps

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Get off The Rapid and walk the remaining distance to your destination.

noCost.title: No options available
noCost.body: Rideshare services typically cost at least $20 (to account for return trip). Prices are often higher on weekends and during events due to surge pricing. Consider adjusting your budget to see recommendations.

default.title: Request a rideshare to your destination
default.body: Request an Uber or Lyft and get dropped off at your destination.

steps.title: Request an Uber/Lyft
steps.description: Open your Uber or Lyft app and request a ride. Set your destination and confirm the ride. Note: Rideshare prices are typically higher on weekends (especially evenings) and during events due to surge pricing. Prices can increase by 50% or more during high-demand periods.

steps.title: Arrive at destination
steps.description: Wait for your driver to arrive, then ride to your destination. The driver will drop you off as close as possible.

noCost.title: No options available
noCost.body: Lime typically costs at least $4. Consider adjusting your budget to see recommendations.

default.title: Find and ride a Lime scooter or bike
default.body: Open the Lime app and find the nearest available scooter or bike. Unlock it and ride directly to your destination.

steps.title: Find a Lime scooter or bike
steps.description: Open the Lime app and locate the nearest available scooter or bike near your starting location.

steps.title: Ride to destination
steps.description: Unlock the scooter or bike and ride directly to your destination.

noWalk.title: No options available
noWalk.body: You're using DASH but not willing to walk any distance. Consider adjusting your walk distance or add modes to see recommendations.

default.title: Take the DASH shuttle
default.body: Use the free DASH downtown shuttle to get closer to your destination, then walk the remaining distance.

steps.title: Find a DASH stop
steps.description: Locate the nearest DASH shuttle stop near your starting location.

steps.title: Board the DASH shuttle
steps.description: Wait for the next DASH shuttle and board it. The shuttle is free and runs through downtown Grand Rapids.

steps.title: Walk to destination
steps.description: Get off the DASH shuttle at a stop near your destination and walk the remaining distance.

default.title: Bike to your destination and lock up nearby
default.body: Ride your bike to your destination. Find a bike rack or secure post near the entrance to lock up. This avoids parking entirely.

steps.title: Ride your bike to destination
steps.description: Ride your bike to your destination.

steps.title: Lock up your bike
steps.description: Find a bike rack or secure post near the entrance and lock up your bike.
